info.name: Bulk update message statuses for channel

params.name: channel_id
params.description: The ID of the channel to update messages for.

params.name: action
params.description: The target status to be applied to the messages.

items.docs: Bulk update the status of messages for a specific channel. The channel is specified by the `channel_id` parameter. The action to perform is specified by the `action` parameter, where the action is a status change action (e.g. `archive`, `unarchive`).
